name: Web & HTTP
description: Outbound HTTP with a strict SSRF guard (shared tools/_lib/web_safety.py: http/https only, private/loopback/link-local/metadata IPs rejected, every redirect hop re-validated). web_find searches a fetched URL or a knowledge source by regex/literal pattern with context windows; http_request is a general verb client (GET/HEAD/POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE/OPTIONS) with size caps, credential-in-URL rejection, and Authorization redaction in echoed data. Auth profiles are a planned later stage — this stage sends only the headers you pass explicitly.
